# Exit codes

<!-- This file is auto-generated by `scripts/gen_docs.py`. Do not edit by hand — re-run the generator instead. -->

`nsc` returns one of the exit codes below. Multiple `ErrorType` values may share
an exit code; the discriminant is the envelope `type` field, not the code.

| Exit code | `type` values |
|---|---|
| `1` | `internal` |
| `3` | `schema` |
| `4` | `input_error`, `validation` |
| `5` | `server` |
| `6` | `client` |
| `7` | `transport` |
| `8` | `auth` |
| `9` | `not_found` |
| `10` | `conflict` |
| `11` | `rate_limited` |
| `12` | `config` |
| `13` | `ambiguous_alias` |
| `14` | `unknown_alias` |

Exit code `0` is reserved for success. Exit code `1` is the catch-all internal-error.
